parameters.query: SELECT COALESCE((config_value->>'system_paused')::boolean, false) AS paused FROM application_config WHERE config_key = 'auto_apply_rules' LIMIT 1

SELECT j.id AS job_id, j.title, j.company, j.location, j.url,
       j.description, j.tier, j.composite_score, j.job_type,
       j.application_method, j.application_email,
       j.cv_file_path, j.cl_file_path,
       j.metadata, j.closing_date
FROM jobs j
WHERE j.ready_to_apply = true
  AND j.tier IN ('A+', 'A', 'B')
  AND (j.closing_date IS NULL OR j.closing_date >= CURRENT_DATE)
  AND j.id NOT IN (
      SELECT job_id FROM applications
      WHERE status NOT IN ('failed', 'expired', 'withdrawn')
  )
ORDER BY
  CASE WHEN j.closing_date IS NOT NULL AND j.closing_date <= CURRENT_DATE + 2
       THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
  CASE j.tier WHEN 'A+' THEN 1 WHEN 'A' THEN 2 WHEN 'B' THEN 3 END,
  j.composite_score DESC
LIMIT 10

INSERT INTO applications (
  job_id, company_name, job_title, pipeline_track,
  current_state, application_method,
  status, method, method_confidence, method_detected_at,
  tier, composite_score, application_type,
  application_email, portal_url, portal_type
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.job_id }}',
  '{{ ($json.company || "Unknown").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.title || "Unknown").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  'corporate',
  'discovered',
  '{{ $json.detected_method === "email" ? "auto_apply" : "manual_portal" }}',
  'method_detected',
  '{{ $json.detected_method }}',
  {{ $json.method_confidence }},
  NOW(),
  '{{ $json.tier }}',
  {{ $json.composite_score || 0 }},
  'direct',
  {{ $json.detected_email ? "'" + $json.detected_email.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.detected_portal_url ? "'" + $json.detected_portal_url.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.detected_portal_type ? "'" + $json.detected_portal_type.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }}
)
RETURNING id AS application_id, job_id, method, tier
UPDATE applications SET status = 'email_ready' WHERE id = '{{ $json.application_id }}'
UPDATE applications SET status = 'portal_task_ready' WHERE id = '{{ $json.application_id }}'
UPDATE applications SET status = 'unknown', method = 'unknown' WHERE id = '{{ $json.application_id }}'
